name: langgraph-changeorder-example
description: An ordinary LangGraph.js change-order agent runs unchanged; a thin Pangolin seam wraps its execution to emit a tamper-evident audit bundle (incl. a cryptographically sealed human approval) that a standalone verifier independently checks. Runs $0 / offline in CI.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict src/agent.ts src/seam.ts src/verify.ts src/run-plain.ts src/run-sealed.ts src/tamper.ts
